html:
This is a listing of all known plant types from the world of A Song of Ice and Fire which are directly referenced in the text or appear on coats of arms. Most plants inhabiting the known world are similar to those of real life. Other creatures include animals and fungi.

Contents

  • 1 Known plants
    • 1.1 Flowers
    • 1.2 Grasses
    • 1.3 Trees
    • 1.4 Miscellaneous
  • 2 See Also
  • 3 Notes
  • 4 References

See Also[ ]

Notes[ ]

  1. ↑ The description indicates that this is specifically maize-corn, the New World crop, and not just using "corn" in the general sense of "grain". From Bran's dream: "When he pulled his hand out, golden kernels slid from between his fingers into the air." And from a description of the Vale: "wheat and corn and barley grew high in its fields".
  2. ↑ Also maize-corn. When Arya travels with Yoren: "They roasted the sweetcorn in the husk that night, turning the ears with long forked sticks, and ate it hot right off the cob."
  3. ↑ Dornish "peppers", by their description, are specifically New World crop "bell peppers", not "black pepper" the Old World spice. Dornish peppers are described as being stuffed with things like cheese.
